title: Perception probe: OUT from the timeline-sheet image alone (no index, no media)
prompt: sheet.png is a timeline sheet of a ~22-second interview answer clip: thumbnails, a motion strip, the audio waveform with silence shading, and a word-aligned transcript on one shared time axis. The media itself is NOT available. Determine where the cut should end: the OUT point lands just after the speaker's final word, with a natural tail of at most ~0.8 seconds - without cutting off any of the ending, even a quiet one. Write your answer to answer.json as {"out": <seconds>}. Do not render or fetch anything.
